title: Few Get Enough
content:
Few get enough, -- enough is one;
    To that ethereal throng
    Have not each one of us the right
    To stealthily belong?
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Few Get Enough"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
